title: ACES Scenario Pack — Compatibility (v0)
description: A pack's declared ACES SDL and pack-version compatibility and the compatibility boundary it claims. Implements 'Compatibility Boundaries' in contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md and does not encode a downstream consumer's deployment matrix, branch rules, labels, or workflow states.

packId.description: Pack this compatibility declaration applies to.

packVersion.description: Pack version (SemVer) this declaration applies to.

sdlContractVersion.description: ACES SDL contract version the pack is compatible with.

boundary.description: The declared line between what the pack owns and what ACES core or a downstream consumer owns.

dependsOn.description: Concepts owned by ACES core or elsewhere that the pack depends on.

breakingChangePolicy.description: How breaking change is reasoned about for this pack (see docs/versioning.md).
